name: Ana Moura
abstract: Ana Cláudia Moura Pereira (born 17 September 1979), known as Ana Moura, is a Portuguese fado singer. An internationally recognized singer, she was the youngest fadista to be nominated for a Dutch Edison Award.

concerts.label: Ana Moura and Buika, Singers
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: I did a lot of work with this fado singer Ana Moura... I wrote this song for the recording and her producer... sent it to them so that they could learn it
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022
